vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on avionics bay due to heat dissipation.
risk.mit: Implement heat sinks or thermal management system.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance for wing spar socket installation.
risk.mit: Increase clearance or redesign socket.

risk.desc: Risk of sensor misalignment due to GPS boom mount.
risk.mit: Review and adjust GPS boom mount design.

risk.desc: Camera window may be prone to damage from rotor wash.
risk.mit: Add protective cover or relocate camera window.

risk.desc: Potential service access issues due to complex internal channel design.
risk.mit: Simplify internal channel design or provide additional access points.

generated_parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
generated_parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present.
verify.rule: Each part_tree child must have at least 4 dedicated geometry_ops that reference it by id or target name.

verify.value: Mass estimation is provided.
verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present in part_tree and geometry_ops.
verify.rule: [p0_feature_mapping] good: P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocal and named.
verify.rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Torque values and preload evidence are provided for critical joints.
verify.rule: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.value: Boundary conditions are defined with fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.
verify.rule: verify must include a boundary_conditions object with fixture_points (list of {at:[x,y,z], type:fixed|pinned|roller}), thermal_zones (list of {at:[x,y,z], W_or_degC:number, role:source|sink}), and pressure_faces (list of {face:string, Pa:number}).

verify.value: Geometry_ops coordinates are distributed across the subsystem volume.
verify.rule: geometry_ops args.at [x,y,z] must be physically distributed across the local subsystem volume.

verify.value: A variety of non-box features are used.
verify.rule: Uses drill, pocket, boss, channel, cylinder, chamfer, fillet, pattern, and engrave where appropriate.

verify.value: Named mechanisms are used with their geometry present.
verify.rule: Motion claims are grounded in a named mechanism type (four-bar linkage, cam, rack-and-pinion, lead screw, ratchet, geneva) with its pivot/axis geometry present.

verify.value: Tilt axis and bearing seats are visible.
verify.rule: Tilt axis, bearing seats, servo/linkage access, and nacelle rotation clearance are visible.

verify.value: Wing spar socket and fuselage spine are separate and inspectable.
verify.rule: Wing spar socket, fuselage spine, and payload/battery service paths are separate and inspectable.

verify.value: Design remains an educational mockup.
verify.rule: Output remains educational mockup, avoiding operational flight tuning or control-law details.

verify.value: Loads route through bearing seats and motor/servo modules are replaceable.
verify.rule: Tilt mechanism loads route through bearing seats into wing structure via named fittings, and motor/servo modules remain replaceable through access covers.

verify.value: A primary datum feature is explicitly named and placed.
verify.rule: A primary datum feature (flat, bore, or pin) is explicitly named and placed.

verify.value: Interfaces include fit_class and stack_up_mm.
verify.rule: Adjacent interfaces include fit_class (H7/h6, LC2) and stack_up_mm.

verify.value: Assembly sequence is defined with tools, torque, and datum.
verify.rule: cad_brief includes ordered assembly_sequence with tool, torque, datum per step.

verify.value: Uses seed-characteristic ops and includes subtractive and finishing features.
verify.rule: Uses seed-characteristic ops: chamfer, pocket, drill, subtract. Subtractive features (drill/pocket/channel) and finishing (fillet/chamfer) both present.

verify.value: Dimensions are physically plausible for the subsystem scale.
verify.rule: Dimensions must be physically plausible for the subsystem scale. Wall thickness, hole diameters, fillet radii must match the stated material and process.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interface fit.
risk.mit: Implement precise alignment tools and detailed assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress due to high motor heat generation.
risk.mit: Install additional cooling features such as heat sinks or cooling fins.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if loads exceed design limits.
risk.mit: Perform stress analysis and ensure material selection is appropriate.

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress through access covers.
risk.mit: Use waterproof seals and ensure proper sealing procedures.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect torque application leading to joint failure.
risk.mit: Provide torque wrenches and detailed torque specifications.

generated_parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
generated_parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

requirements: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles

verify.rule: All required fields and structure are present.
mass_est_g is a numeric value.
Each P0 internal_feature_target has corresponding geometry_ops.
Each interface includes exact neighboring subsystem labels and joint family.
Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.
Boundary conditions include fixture_points.
Boundary conditions include thermal_zones.
Boundary conditions include pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Thermal dissipation from bearing seat to wing structure may be insufficient for long-term operation in high-temperature environments.
risk.mit: Increase the surface area of the bearing seat and optimize the heat sink design for better thermal management.

risk.desc: The torque required for fastening the bearing seat mount may exceed the capabilities of the specified torque wrench, risking over-tightening or under-tightening.
risk.mit: Specify a higher-capacity torque wrench or use a torque multiplier tool.

risk.desc: The harness routing path may be too tight, causing stress on the wires during assembly and disassembly.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the harness routing path to allow for easier installation and maintenance.

risk.desc: The access cover may not provide sufficient clearance for maintenance tasks, potentially leading to operational delays.
risk.mit: Design the access cover to open fully and provide clear access to the servo and linkage components.

risk.desc: The alignment of the tilt axis with the nacelle tilt axis may be critical for seamless rotation, requiring precise manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement a more robust alignment process and ensure that all components are manufactured to tight tolerances.
